question: What would another AI session need to know?
title: AI context
summary: Handoff notes written for the next Cursor session—not for humans reading documentation for fun.

scenes.headline: Future AI reads this before it edits your repo.
scenes.body: Every coding agent starts cold. Without repository context it invents auth, swaps databases, and adds fields without migrations. These notes are the antidote—written once, reused every session.

scenes.label: Status field session — how capture worked
scenes.description: A real pattern from month 1. The implementation is code; the memory is in .vibekb/sessions/.
scenes.insight: The session summary took five minutes. Re-explaining the same rejection every month would take hours.

steps.title: Implements migration + UI
steps.text: Adds column, form select, list filter in one pass.

steps.title: Captures session summary
steps.text: Records rejected Kanban and auto-archive in sessions/status-field-session.md.
steps.example: Rejected: automatic status transitions from date fields.

steps.title: Next session reads guide first
steps.text: Agent does not add a fourth status or workflow engine without a new decision.

scenes.label: AI session start checklist
scenes.summary: Paste or point your agent here at the start of every session.

points.title: Read boundaries
points.text: decisions/ and warnings/ before suggesting architecture changes.

points.title: Read alignment
points.text: Five-part save path if touching forms or schema.

points.title: Update after
points.text: Guide chapter, decision, or debugging file if intent changed.

points.title: Do not
points.text: Add auth, uploads, or DB engine switches without a recorded decision.

cards.title: Status field session
cards.teaser: What was built and what was rejected in one Cursor afternoon.

cards.title: SQLite reconsideration
cards.teaser: PostgreSQL suggestion deflected with existing decision.
points: Export does not require engine change

cards.title: Blank list debug
points: Ordered checks now in debugging guide

scenes.headline: This is what day-one VibeKB buys you.
scenes.body: Not prettier docs—a shorter distance between “AI generated it” and “I know why it is that way.” Initialize on the empty repo so month six feels like this instead of archaeology.

facts.label: AI handoff
facts.text: ai-session-start.md for every new agent session.
